title: Climate Action Incentive - Canada.ca
content:
## Climate Action Incentive Statistics
The Climate Action Incentive (CAI) statistics present data based on the information that the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) collected and processed for all eligible individuals for a specific tax year.
This publication is discontinued. For statistics on the Canada Carbon Rebate, please consult the Canada Carbon Rebate (CCR) Statistics publication.
- 2022 Edition (2020 tax year)
- 2021 Edition (2019 tax year)
- 2020 Edition (2018 tax year)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
